title: erigeron mariposanus
intro: Erigeron mariposanus, also known as Mariposa daisy or Mariposa fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erigeron mariposanus include reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues, among others. Erigeron mariposanus can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and valuable medicinal plant.
